title: Anthony Dayao
compiled_truth: Anthony Dayao is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-22 to 2002-01-24), Anthony Dayao sent 14 and received 167 emails, totalling 181 interactions.
